description: Metadata field canonicalization. Demonstrates that nested object keys are also sorted by JCS, and that producer-defined metadata is part of the signed body.

vectors.name: Body with metadata canonicalization and SHA-256
vectors.description: Producer-supplied body with a metadata object. Inside metadata, keys 'sample_size' and 'score' are sorted lexicographically.
implementer_notes: JCS sorts object keys at every nesting level. Implementations that only sort top-level keys will produce the wrong hash for any body with nested objects.
0.85 in the canonical form is exact and within IEEE-754 double precision. Producers using arbitrary-precision decimals MUST coerce to double before signing.
